/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/hav_cpp_from_python_2.dir/ekf.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hav_cpp_from_python_2.dir/geo_ned.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hav_cpp_from_python_2.dir/main_utm_2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hav_cpp_from_python_2.dir/utm.cpp.o -o hav_cpp_from_python_2
